forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.comingSoon: Coming soon. Email-based password reset isn't configured yet.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

alarms.emptyHint: Tap + to create your first one
alarms.detailComingSoon: Detail and editing ship in the next iteration.
alarms.noPlacesYet: You don't have any saved places yet.
alarms.repeatAlwaysHint: By default the alarm is deactivated after firing once. Turn this on to be notified every time you cross the threshold.
alarms.activeWindowHint: Alarm only fires inside the given window (useful if you know you'll be there part of the day).
alarms.triggerRequired: Pick how to fire it (time, place or both).
alarms.dateInPast: The date and time are already past.
alarms.placeRequired: Pick a saved place or switch to map point.
alarms.activeOn: Will fire when the condition matches.
alarms.crossAgendaHint: Creating an alarm on {{name}}'s agenda. You can only pick places they've shared with you.
alarms.noSharedPlacesFromFriend: This friend hasn't shared any places with you yet.
alarms.rejectConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to reject "{{title}}"? The alarm will be deleted.

places.emptyHint: Tap + to add your first place
places.newComingSoon: The map picker ships in the next step of Phase 3.
places.detailComingSoon: Detail and editing ship in the next iteration.
places.name: Name
places.tapToMove: Tap the map or drag the pin to adjust the position.
places.deleteConfirmBody: Delete "{{name}}"? Alarms that use it will stop firing.
places.searchError: Could not look up the address.
places.sharedWithHint: Friends with access can create alarms on your agenda that reference this place. They never see your location.
places.noFriendsAvailable: You have no friends available to share this place with.

friends.title: Friends
friends.userNotFound: No user found with that email.
friends.alreadyExists: You already have a relationship with this user.
friends.searchError: Could not look up the user.
friends.emptyAccepted: You don't have any friends yet.
friends.removeConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to stop being friends with {{name}}? Alarms you've created for each other will stay.
friends.autoAcceptHint: When on, alarms this friend creates for you appear in your agenda right away. When off, you'll need to accept them manually.

permissions.title: Permissions and geofencing
permissions.alwaysHelp: For place-based alarms to fire when the app is closed, iOS and Android require the "Always allow" location permission. Without it, alarms only fire while the app is open.
